description: A React component named Modal that renders an accessible modal dialog with backdrop, support for close interactions via Escape key and backdrop click, and customizable header, body, footer content.

methods.name: Modal({ open, title, description, children, onClose, footer })
methods.description: Functional React component that displays a modal dialog with props for open state, title, description, children content, onClose callback, and footer.
